name: International Community School (ICS) Singapore
tagline: American Christian education in the heart of Singapore
description: International Community School (ICS) is an American Christian international school located in the Clementi area. ICS offers a US-based curriculum from Kindergarten through Grade 12 with a biblical worldview integrated across subjects. The school provides AP courses at the high school level and is accredited by ACSI and WASC. With under 400 students, ICS provides a close-knit, faith-based learning environment.

admission.process: ICS seeks families who align with its Christian mission. Applications include a family interview and pastor reference.

faqs.question: Is ICS only for Christian families?
faqs.answer: ICS is a Christian school that welcomes families of all faiths who are supportive of a Christian educational environment. At least one parent must profess the Christian faith.

seo.title: ICS Singapore — American Christian International School | EduAtlas
seo.description: International Community School Singapore: American Christian education for K-12. AP courses, small class sizes. View 2025/2026 fees and admission requirements.
